infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Engage App saves media you export from the app into your photo library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Engage App accesses your photo library to let you choose videos that appear in the app.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Engage App uses your location to show nearby content and services while you use the app.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Engage App uses your location to keep your live location updated.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Engage App uses the camera to capture photos inside the app before you publish them.

plugins.photosPermission: Engage App needs access to your gallery to save images.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Engage App needs permission to save images to your gallery.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Engage App uses your location to show nearby talent.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Engage App uses your location to keep your live location updated.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Engage App uses your location to show nearby talent.
